notes: Antithetic OpenAI-ES with rank-normalised updates on a 232k-param char-transformer (L=4, d=64, ctx=64). Completed 150 ES iters in 60.8s (spec-capped, well under the 270s budget); val char-acc 0.1900 narrowly missed the spec's honest target of 0.20 and the 0.70 DQ floor. Mean per-iter NLL fell from ~5.56 to ~3.6 over training.
